result.stderr:
mdsnippets 28.0.2+c768289a549e352f9ac53b8dd4b2000df45c9419
Copyright 2026. All rights reserved

  -t, --target-directory            The target directory to run against.
                                    Optional. If no directory is passed the
                                    current directory will be used, but only if
                                    it exists with a git repository directory
                                    tree. If not an error is returned.

  -e, --exclude-directories         Directories to be excluded. Optional. Colon
                                    ':' separated for multiple values.

  --exclude-markdown-directories    Directories to be excluded from markdown
                                    searching. Optional. Colon ':' separated for
                                    multiple values.

  --exclude-snippet-directories     Directories to be excluded from snippet
                                    searching. Optional. Colon ':' separated for
                                    multiple values.

  --toc-excludes                    Headings to be excluded from table of
                                    contents. Optional. Colon ':' separated for
                                    multiple values.

  -u, --urls-as-snippets            Urls to files to be included as snippets.
                                    Optional. Space ' ' separated for multiple
                                    values.
                                    Each url will be accessible using the file
                                    name as a key. Any snippets within the files
                                    will be extracted and accessible as
                                    individual keyed snippets.

  -r, --read-only                   Set resultant md files as read-only.
                                    Optional. Defaults to false.

  -v, --validate-content            Validate the content. Optional. Defaults to
                                    false.

  --write-header                    Write a header at the top of each resultant
                                    md file. Optional. Defaults to true

  --missing-as-warning              The default behavior for a missing
                                    snippet/include is to log an error (or throw
                                    an exception). To change that behavior to a
                                    warning set TreatMissingAsWarning to true.
                                    Optional. Defaults to false

  --omit-snippet-links              The default behavior snippet links is to
                                    have both an anchor and a link to the
                                    snippet source. Optional. Defaults to false

  --header                          The header to write. `{relativePath}` is
                                    replaced with the current .source.md file.
                                    Optional. Defaults to:
                                    GENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT
                                    This file was generated by
                                    [MarkdownSnippets](https://github.com/SimonC
                                    ropp/MarkdownSnippets).
                                    Source File: {relativePath}
                                    To change this file edit the source file and
                                    then run MarkdownSnippets.

  --url-prefix                      The prefix to add to all the snippet URLs.
                                    Optional. Defaults to: null

  -l, --link-format                 Controls the format of the link under each
                                    snippet. Optional. Supported values: GitHub,
                                    Tfs. Defaults to GitHub.

  -c, --convention                  Controls the target document convention.
                                    Optional. Supported values: SourceTransform,
                                    InPlaceOverwrite. Defaults to
                                    SourceTransform.

  --toc-level                       Controls how many header levels to write in
                                    the table of contents. Optional. Defaults to
                                    2. Must be positive.

  --max-width                       Controls the maximum character width for
                                    snippets. Optional. Defaults to ignore. Must
                                    be positive.

  --help                            Display this help screen.

  --version                         Display version information.

options.description: Controls the target document convention. Optional. Supported values: SourceTransform, InPlaceOverwrite. Defaults to SourceTransform.
Directories to be excluded. Optional. Colon ':' separated for multiple values.
Directories to be excluded from markdown searching. Optional. Colon ':' separated for multiple values.
Directories to be excluded from snippet searching. Optional. Colon ':' separated for multiple values.

The header to write. `{relativePath}` is replaced with the current .source.md file. Optional. Defaults to:
GENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT
This file was generated by [MarkdownSnippets](https://github.com/SimonCropp/MarkdownSnippets).
Source File: {relativePath}
To change this file edit the source file and then run MarkdownSnippets.
Controls the format of the link under each snippet. Optional. Supported values: GitHub, Tfs. Defaults to GitHub.
Controls the maximum character width for snippets. Optional. Defaults to ignore. Must be positive.
The default behavior for a missing snippet/include is to log an error (or throw an exception). To change that behavior to a warning set TreatMissingAsWarning to true. Optional. Defaults to false
The default behavior snippet links is to have both an anchor and a link to the snippet source. Optional. Defaults to false
Set resultant md files as read-only. Optional. Defaults to false.
The target directory to run against. Optional. If no directory is passed the current directory will be used, but only if it exists with a git repository directory tree. If not an error is returned.
Headings to be excluded from table of contents. Optional. Colon ':' separated for multiple values.
Controls how many header levels to write in the table of contents. Optional. Defaults to 2. Must be positive.
The prefix to add to all the snippet URLs. Optional. Defaults to: null

Urls to files to be included as snippets. Optional. Space ' ' separated for multiple values.
Each url will be accessible using the file name as a key. Any snippets within the files will be extracted and accessible as individual keyed snippets.
Validate the content. Optional. Defaults to false.
Write a header at the top of each resultant md file. Optional. Defaults to true
